events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Multi-talented global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday today.

angles.name: J.Lo's Influence
angles.copy: From the Bronx to global icon, Jennifer Lopez turns 57. What's your favourite J.Lo track or movie moment?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, first launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years since MTV changed the game. Remember watching the first music video? What was it for you?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on this day in 1994, launching them to stardom.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Impact
angles.copy: Thirty-two years of 'Definitely Maybe'. That Oasis debut still sounds as fresh as ever. What's your top track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for peace, love, and music. What a moment in history Woodstock was.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on. His music and legend live on forever.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's shooting
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the shooting incident involving Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas in 1996; he would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Remembering the impact of Tupac Shakur. His music and legacy continue to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after we lost one of the greatest guitarists of all time.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring that famous zebra crossing cover, was released on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years of Abbey Road. Which track from the Beatles' masterpiece is always on your playlist?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders anthem?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The inimitable former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad Fer It
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite tune featuring his iconic vocals?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-one years of 'Imagine'. John Lennon's timeless message still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? Twenty-five years since Apple changed the game for portable music. How many songs did yours hold?

events.title: It's James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today marks James Bond Day, celebrating the enduring legacy of the iconic British secret agent.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Which Bond theme song is your all-time favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the enduring spirit and music of John Lennon.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The celebrated British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles released 'White Album' 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, famously known as the 'White Album', was released on this day in 1968.

angles.name: The White Album
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles dropped the iconic 'White Album'. A truly diverse masterpiece. What's your hidden gem from it?
